title: BOB.jar
description: Make your minecraft experience so much worse!
body:
This mod is purely made to make your minecraft experience worse!
Inspired by "GREG.jar" by DiffyMC.

This mod makes your life worse in almost every way, but don't worry, with certain items you can craft special items to get back to vanilla (aka just like, the game not being rly annoying)!

**Recommended to play in singleplayer, unless you hate yourself (and others).**

### Features:
- Hindered movement!
- Corruption of items!
- Mobs may turn into creepers!
- Blocks may not place when you place them!
- Blocks may explode when you break them!
- You randomly overheat in the nether (you overheat more the more armour you have on)!
- You randomly get frostbite in the end!
More features may be added in further updates!
Check changelog for more info!

I recommend only downloading this on either a non-serious server or just to annoy others (or yourself!)
**This mod is early in development so expect bugs and unintended things to happen.**
